source: Plan 14-06 hand-calc; Santa Clara CA SFH @ $1,850,000 with $28,000/mo household at 20% DP; $1,480,000 loan_amount exceeds Santa Clara conforming high-cost limit $1,249,125 (data/reference/conforming-limits-2026.yml) AND FHA high-cost ceiling $1,249,125 (data/reference/fha-limits-2026.yml) → Conv30/Conv15 blocked by FHFA-LIMIT-CONFORMING, FHA30 blocked by HUD-LIMIT-CEILING-EXCEEDED, Jumbo30 row materializes as the 4th program and is eligible at preferred 20% DP. Verdict cascade Level 3 WATCH STRESS-INCOME-SHOCK fires on Jumbo30.
notes: Cascade level 3 (WATCH STRESS-INCOME-SHOCK) per lib.property_verdict.synthesize: at preferred 20% DP only Jumbo30 is eligible (Conv30/Conv15 carry FHFA-LIMIT-CONFORMING-06-085 blocker because the $1,480,000 financed exceeds the Santa Clara CA county high-cost limit of $1,249,125; FHA30 raises NotImplementedError from lib.rules.loan_type.classify (loan > FHA ceiling) which Plan 14-05's _build_program_result catches and emits as HUD-LIMIT-CEILING-EXCEEDED per D-14-MATRIX-02 explicit-ineligible-rows). The lone Jumbo30 eligible cell then fails the income-shock stress: stressed DTI = (11387.94 + 1000) / (28000 × 0.70) = 0.632038 > Jumbo30 ceiling 0.43 → VERDICT_WATCH_STRESS_INCOME_FAIL fires before any GO branch reaches. Hand-calc anchors via lib.amortize.build_schedule on $1,480,000 principal @ 6.5%/30yr (fixed, since Jumbo30 program maps to loan_type='fixed' in _make_cell_loan and _build_program_result) → monthly_pi=$9354.61 (12mo interest sum=$95,712.94). PITI Jumbo30 = 9354.61 + (22000/12=1833.33) + (2400/12=200.00) + 0 (HOA) + 0 (no PMI at 80% LTV) = $11,387.94 (Pitfall 6 quantize-once). Tax: qualified_loan_limit=$750,000 (mfj filing); Jumbo30 $1,480,000 > $750k → over_750k_cap_per_program['Jumbo30']=true (IRS Pub 936 partial-deductibility flag set; Phase 15 renders 'see CPA' callout). 24 cells = 4 programs × 6 DPs (D-14-MATRIX-03 jumbo-row materialization).

_meta.citation: ANLZ-01 + ANLZ-02 + ANLZ-03 + VERD-01: covers D-14-MATRIX-03 (Jumbo30 5th-row materialization on price > conforming), D-14-MATRIX-02 (Conv/FHA cells present-but-ineligible with populated numerics per ANLZ-02), ANLZ-03 (auxiliary blocks at preferred DP — tax block over_750k flag fires), and VERD-01 cascade Level 3 (D-14-VERDICT-02 income-shock falsifiable predicate).

verdict.headline_reason: Income-shock stress breaches DTI ceiling for 1 eligible program(s)

blocker_reasons: HUD-LIMIT-CEILING-EXCEEDED: loan_amount 1480000.00 exceeds FHA county ceiling 1249125 for Santa Clara; loans above the FHA ceiling are not eligible for the FHA program (consider conventional jumbo)
